title: codereview-pass2: kiss test init completeness
description: Reviewed init in test_cmd_txdelay and related. Finding P3: init called repeatedly with EALREADY path; test_reset handles params but config copy only happens on first init. If callbacks changed, would be incomplete. Suggestion: add kiss_transport_test_reset() that also allows re-config or document. P4: zassert_true for init ret could be more specific zassert_true(ret == 0 || ret == -EALREADY). P4: frame var could be const. Treat as real: update comments and asserts. Tagged codereview. Parent: project-LICHEN-ru3u
